# Peri Peri Grill House

> 100% halal peri peri chicken, marinated overnight and flame-grilled to order. Two locations in New York: Brooklyn (Bed-Stuy) and Bethpage (Long Island).

## About

Peri Peri Grill House is a halal restaurant specializing in flame-grilled peri peri chicken. Our chicken is marinated overnight in a special blend of peri peri spices featuring African Bird's Eye chili, then grilled to order over an open flame. We offer seven heat levels from Plain-ish (no heat) to Extra Hot.

Peri peri cooking originated in Southeast Africa when Portuguese settlers combined the African Bird's Eye chili pepper with garlic, citrus, and oil to create what is now known as peri peri sauce.

## Locations

### Brooklyn (Bed-Stuy)
- Address: 235 Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn, NY 11233
- Phone: (917) 966-8614
- Hours: Tue-Sat 12 PM - 10 PM, Sun 12 PM - 9 PM, Mon Closed
- Neighborhood: Bed-Stuy, near Utica Ave A/C station

### Bethpage (Long Island)
- Address: 629 Hicksville Rd, Bethpage, NY 11714
- Phone: (516) 261-9953
- Hours: Mon-Wed 11 AM - 10 PM, Thu-Sat 11 AM - 12 AM, Sun 12 PM - 12 AM
- Serves: Bethpage, Hicksville, Farmingdale, Massapequa, Nassau County

## Menu Highlights (dine-in/takeout prices, delivery prices may vary)

### Peri Peri Chicken
- 6 Wings: $9.99
- 12 Wings: $18.99
- 24 Wings: $35.99
- 1/4 Chicken Leg & Thigh: $6.49
- 1/4 Chicken Breast & Wing: $7.49
- 1/2 Chicken: $13.49
- Whole Chicken: $25.99
- Breast Fillet w/ Rice & Salad: $11.49

### Sandwiches & Burgers (single/double available)
- Grilled Chicken Sandwich: $9.99 / $14.99
- Falafel Burger: $9.99 / $14.99
- Peri Classic Smash: $7.50 / $10.50 / $13.50 (triple)
- Peri Oklahoma Smash: $8.50 / $11.50 / $14.50 (triple)

### Wraps (single/double available)
- Grilled Chicken Wrap: $9.99 / $14.99
- Falafel Wrap: $9.99 / $14.99

### Made to Share
- 1 Whole Chicken + 4 Sides: $44.99
- 2 Whole Chickens + 6 Sides: $79.99

### Sides (from $4.99)
- Peri Peri Fries, Mashed Potatoes, Peri Peri Rice, Corn on the Cob, Mac & Cheese, Side Salad, Coleslaw: $4.99
- Lentil Soup & Pita: $5.49
- Loaded Fries: $7.50

### Milkshakes (16oz)
- Dubai Shake: $10.99 (Bethpage only)
- Nutella/Biscoff/Mango Shake: $9.99
- Chocolate/Vanilla Shake: $6.99

### Combo: +$5.99 (add 1 side + 1 fountain drink to any sandwich, wrap, or burger)

## Heat Levels (Peri Scale, mild to spicy)
1. Lemon & Herb — citrusy, zero heat
2. Mango Passion — sweet tropical, no heat
3. Garlic & Herb — savory roasted garlic
4. Jerk BBQ — smoky Caribbean with mild warmth
5. Mild — balanced peri peri kick
6. Hot — serious African Bird's Eye heat
7. Extra Hot — maximum heat for spice warriors

## Key Facts
- 100% Halal certified
- Chicken marinated overnight (minimum 12 hours)
- Flame-grilled to order (never baked or fried)
- Dine-in, takeout, and delivery available
- Delivery via UberEats and DoorDash
- Catering available for events
